title: GLOW Lazy Susan Glass Turntable – Elegant Tempered Serving Tray Revolves 360Deg Rotating Board Plate Dish Table Centrepiece Serve Cakes Cheese Snacks, 25cm
features: The GLOW Lazy Susan Glass and Wooden Turntables can add an Elegant Look to Any Event at Home, in a Cafe or in a Restaurant to Serve and Display your Snacks, Condiments or Sweet Dishes
Lightweight and Easy to Clean - Ideal for Catering Events in Hotels, Bars, Restaurants, Cafes or for that Special Christmas Dinner at Home

Our Glass Lazy Susan is Made from High Quality Tempered Glass Rotating 360 Degrees and Heat Resistant to 240 Degrees C with an Aluminium Base to Provide Stability; With Our Wooden Lazy Susan Made from Sustainable Rubber Wood
Convenient Swivel Design is Ideal for Serving Snacks or Condiments and also Perfect for Bakers to Serve or Add Finishing Touches to Cakes and Pastries
Dimensions - Glass 25cm - W25cm x D25cm x H3cm Wooden 35cm - W35cm x D35cm x H3cm Wooden 35cm with Dishes - W35cm x D35cm x H7cm (All Dimensions Approx)
description: If you are having your friends around for the big match, or are planning a more formal event, Our versatile Lazy Susan Turntables can add an elegant look to your event, whether at home, in a cafe or in a restaurant to serve and display your snacks, condiments or sweet dishes. Suitable for both Indoor and Outdoor use, whichever way you choose to use it, this stylish glass serving tray will add to your decorated backdrop for an unforgettable presentation of any event. Our Glass Lazy Susan is made from a strong and robust construction of tempered glass and featuring a plate which rotates 360 Degrees and heat resistant to 240 Degrees C on an aluminium base to provide stability, the GLOW Lazy Susan is easy to handle, move around the house and can withstand the rigours of commercial use. Easy to wipe clean and store, the GLOW Lazy Susan Turntable will make your time serving guests that little bit more effortless and carefree. Wash Before Use Not Recommended for the Dishwasher
